mainFeedback.title: Samira: E only with an exit
mainFeedback.focus: Before every E, name the exit: lethal reset, Flash, teammate cover, or a clean walk-out path.
mainFeedback.rule: Kill or tower -> crash wave, take objective space, or recall; no second fight unless it wins the map.
mainFeedback.nextRep: Next queue cue: exit before E.

detectedChampions.name: Samira
detectedChampions.evidence: Fallback uses the match-level Samira read from sampled replay frames and side-list evidence.
detectedChampions.improvementTitle: E only after the exit exists
detectedChampions.improvement: Hold E until the target is lethal or a reset, Flash, teammate cover, or clean walk-out path is already visible.

recordings.title: highlight 01
recordings.feedbackTitle: E only after the exit exists
recordings.feedback: Hold E until the target is lethal or a reset, Flash, teammate cover, or clean walk-out path is already visible.
recordings.evidence: Fallback uses the match-level Samira read from sampled replay frames and side-list evidence.

recordings.title: highlight 02
recordings.feedbackTitle: Name the CC before going in
recordings.feedback: Before E/R, identify the one spell that cancels the play; enter only after it is spent, blocked by W, or aimed elsewhere.
recordings.evidence: Fallback uses the match-level Samira read from sampled replay frames and side-list evidence.

recordings.title: highlight 03
recordings.feedback: A low target past vision is not free; shove the wave or take plate unless the next enemy position is known.
recordings.evidence: Fallback uses the match-level Samira read from sampled replay frames and side-list evidence.

recordings.title: highlight 04
recordings.feedback: After the first kill or forced recall, crash wave first, then choose plate, dragon move, reset, or support roam.
recordings.evidence: Fallback uses the match-level Samira read from sampled replay frames and side-list evidence.

recordings.title: highlight 05
recordings.feedback: Let Q, autos, and W collect cooldowns before entering; Samira should clean the fight, not start it blind.
recordings.evidence: Fallback uses the match-level Samira read from sampled replay frames and side-list evidence.

recordings.title: highlight 06
recordings.feedback: Keep at least five seconds before and after the fight so the trigger, cooldowns, and exit can be judged.
recordings.evidence: The recording is shorter than three seconds.

recordings.title: highlight 07
recordings.feedback: After a tower or multi-kill, leave while holding gold; dying after the win gives away the tempo that should climb.
recordings.evidence: Fallback uses the match-level Samira read from sampled replay frames and side-list evidence.

recordings.title: highlight 08
recordings.feedback: If a teammate dies nearby, count visible enemies before joining; do not spend E to rescue a fight already lost.
recordings.evidence: Fallback uses the match-level Samira read from sampled replay frames and side-list evidence.

recordings.title: highlight 09
recordings.feedback: Catch the wave, then leave toward teammates; stay side only when mid has priority or three enemies are visible.
recordings.evidence: Fallback uses the match-level Samira read from sampled replay frames and side-list evidence.

recordings.title: highlight 10
recordings.feedbackTitle: Do not duel without the exit
recordings.feedback: When an enemy catches a wave, pressure the objective first; take the duel only with ult, summoner info, and a walk-out.
recordings.evidence: Fallback uses the match-level Samira read from sampled replay frames and side-list evidence.

recordings.title: highlight 11
recordings.feedback: At jungle walls, hold the edge until enemy CC is used; entering first makes Samira the target instead of the finisher.
recordings.evidence: Fallback uses the match-level Samira read from sampled replay frames and side-list evidence.

recordings.title: highlight 12
recordings.feedback: At inhib or nexus, kills are only a tool; hit the structure as soon as the fight is won instead of extending.
recordings.evidence: Fallback uses the match-level Samira read from sampled replay frames and side-list evidence.

recordings.title: full game 8x
recordings.feedback: 16/10 Samira says damage is not the gap; climb by refusing the second fight unless it buys tower, dragon, Baron, or nexus.
recordings.evidence: Fallback uses the match-level Samira read from sampled replay frames and side-list evidence.
